message: bd-lff4p.2.5: integrate glyph layout metadata + rendering follow-ups

files.patch:
@@ -1353,13 +1353,13 @@
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.15","title":"Implement: in-terminal search (scrollback search + highlight + next/prev)","description":"Goal
- Provide xterm.js-class search UX: find text in scrollback, highlight matches, and jump next/prev.

Scope
- Search should respect Unicode normalization and be fast on large scrollback.
- Highlighting must be incremental (avoid full redraw).

Testing
- Unit tests for search correctness on Unicode + wrapped lines.
- Perf tests on large scrollback.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.16","title":"Implement: accessibility layer (screen reader + high-contrast + reduced motion)","description":"Goal
- Ensure FrankenTerm is usable for keyboard-only users and screen readers despite using WebGPU/canvas rendering.

Scope
- DOM mirror mode (offscreen/hidden) for screen readers with ARIA roles.
- High-contrast and reduced-motion support.
- Keyboard navigation and focus indicators.

Testing
- E2E: a11y mode scripts + JSONL logs.
- Static checks for ARIA invariants.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:43.869839610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:43.869839610Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.16","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:43.869839610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.16","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:43.869839610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.16","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:43.869839610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.16","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:43.869839610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.17","title":"E2E: browser interaction scripts + detailed JSONL logging (FrankenTerm)","description":"Goal
- Add end-to-end browser interaction scripts that validate correctness AND produce high-signal logs.

Requirements
- Scripts cover: selection+copy, paste, OSC8 link click, resize storms, search, and long scrollback.
- Emit JSONL conforming to shared schema, including:
  - run_id, git_sha, browser, DPR, size
  - input counts + encoded bytes
  - frame hashes, patch sizes, and timing histograms

Acceptance Criteria
- Failures yield minimal repro traces that can be replayed deterministically.

-{"id":"bd-lff4p.2.18","title":"Implement: Unicode/emoji rendering correctness (ZWJ, combining marks, wide chars)","description":"Goal
- Ensure FrankenTerm renders the full modern Unicode surface area with terminal-appropriate semantics.

Scope
- Wide glyphs, emoji sequences (ZWJ), variation selectors, combining marks.
- Fallback strategy when shaping is not available.

Testing
- Golden fixtures (strings -> expected cell layout) reused across core + web.
- Visual checksum tests for representative lines.

","notes":"2026-02-09 BoldHarbor progress: implemented core Unicode scalar width plumbing via Cell::display_width (0/1/2) and Grid::write_printable with wide-char overlap fixups and deterministic fallback for non-spacing scalars (combining marks/ZWJ/VS) as ignored width-0 writes. Rewired all parser Action::Print application paths in frankenterm-core conformance/differential/model-check/proptest harnesses plus parser_patch_bench full-pipeline path to use width-aware write/advance semantics (including width-2 wrap-before-write handling at right margin). Added/updated tests: cell::display_width_unicode_cases and grid write_printable coverage; all quality gates pass (cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test -p frankenterm-core). Remaining for full bead closure: web-path parity + representative visual checksum fixtures for Unicode/emoji sequences in frankenterm-web pipeline.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BoldHarbor","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:44.474276342Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T03:18:49.103717968Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.18","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:44.474276342Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.18","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:44.474276342Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.18","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:44.474276342Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.19","title":"Optional: ligatures/shaping pipeline (Harfbuzz)","description":"Goal
- Support code-font ligatures and better complex-script shaping when it materially improves UX.

Acceptance Criteria
- Shaping is feature-gated and does not regress perf by default.
- Golden checks prove layout stability.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","title":"Implement: new crate frankenterm-web (wasm-bindgen API + build plumbing)","description":"Goal
- Add `crates/frankenterm-web` with WASM bindings and a minimal JS-facing API.

Requirements
- `#![forbid(unsafe_code)]`.
- Expose: init(canvas_id or handle), resize, feed_input, present_patch.

Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo check -p frankenterm-web --target wasm32-unknown-unknown` succeeds.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.20","title":"Optional: auto URL detection (non-OSC8) + safe click handling","description":"Goal
- Detect plain-text URLs in the viewport/scrollback and make them clickable (similar to xterm.js WebLinks addon).

Scope
- Heuristics tuned to avoid false positives in code.
- Security: sanitize and enforce allowed protocols.

Testing
- Fixture corpus for common URL forms.
- E2E: click opens expected target (or emits link event) with JSONL logs.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","title":"Implement: WebGPU renderer skeleton (device init + background cell quads)","description":"Goal
- Get pixels on screen: render the terminal background + cell backgrounds at interactive speeds.

Requirements
- WebGPU init (adapter/device/queue) + resize handling.
- Draw pass for background and per-cell bg colors.
- Path for applying dirty-span patches only (no full redraw required).

Acceptance Criteria
- A minimal web harness can render a synthetic grid and resize without artifacts.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ChartreuseStream","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:31:59.908139015Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T20:31:59.908120100Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:52.352652196Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1012,"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"WebGPU renderer skeleton complete (4fff96e9). Implements ADR-009: wgpu device init + surface config, instanced cell quad pipeline (storage buffer + WGSL shader), dirty-span patch updates via queue.write_buffer, resize handling with buffer rebuild, 4 unit tests. Text rendering deferred to bd-lff4p.2.5.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:31:55Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","title":"Implement: glyph rasterization + atlas cache (monospace first)","description":"Goal
- Turn glyphs into atlas textures with stable metrics and minimal overhead.

Requirements
- Start with monospace ASCII + box drawing + common symbols; expand to full Unicode coverage via bd-lff4p.2.18.
- Deterministic glyph keys/ids across runs and platforms (within a given font build).
- Cache with explicit eviction policy + metrics (hit/miss, bytes, upload cost).
- Hot path: no allocations when glyph already cached.

Testing
- Unit tests for key stability and eviction invariants.
- Golden fixtures for a representative glyph set (metrics + atlas coordinates).
- Bench harness integration to measure cache miss cost and steady-state throughput.

Acceptance Criteria
- Benchable API: given a glyph key, returns atlas coords and advances with no allocations in hot path.
- Upload + packing strategy is measurable and regression-gated.
","notes":"2026-02-09 AmberMountain: starting work; focusing on glyph atlas cache API correctness + eviction/metrics invariants + benches/tests; coordinating via Agent Mail.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GoldForest","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T03:03:23.663941223Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T03:03:23.663918771Z","close_reason":"Acceptance met by merged slices: deterministic glyph ID/cache API with hot-path hit; representative charset golden fixtures; renderer bench integration; explicit glyph_atlas_cache perf budgets + quick-mode gating wiring in scripts/bench_budget.sh.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:59.289665299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1034,"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"WindyDeer support slice (2026-02-09): added atlas-cache invariant tests in crates/frankenterm-web/src/glyph_atlas.rs: (1) lru_touch_keeps_recent_entry_hot, (2) bytes_uploaded_changes_only_on_miss, (3) cached_bytes_never_exceeds_budget. Validation run: cargo fmt --check, cargo check -p frankenterm-web --all-targets, cargo clippy -p frankenterm-web --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test -p frankenterm-web glyph_atlas (10 tests passed). Note: workspace-wide clippy currently fails on unrelated clippy::type-complexity in crates/frankenterm-core/benches/parser_patch_bench.rs, and that file is under another agent's exclusive reservation.","created_at":"2026-02-09T02:08:44Z"},{"id":1035,"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","author":"OrangeMill","text":"OrangeMill update: implemented glyph-atlas benchmark integration in crates/frankenterm-web/benches/renderer_bench.rs (new web/glyph_atlas_cache group with miss_insert_single, hit_hot_path, eviction_cycle_3keys_budget2; objective/stats black_boxed). Validation: cargo fmt --check -- crates/frankenterm-web/benches/renderer_bench.rs; cargo check -p frankenterm-web --all-targets; cargo bench -p frankenterm-web --bench renderer_bench --no-run; ubs crates/frankenterm-web/benches/renderer_bench.rs. Workspace-wide check/clippy currently blocked by unrelated existing errors in ftui-demo-showcase and frankenterm-core.","created_at":"2026-02-09T02:11:08Z"},{"id":1036,"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"WindyDeer follow-up support slice landed in db123980: added deterministic representative charset golden fixture test in crates/frankenterm-web/src/glyph_atlas.rs () covering ASCII + box-drawing + symbols with explicit expected atlas slot/draw coords and metrics. UBS rust-only run completed with expected test-assert/expect heuristic warnings and no critical findings.","created_at":"2026-02-09T02:18:04Z"},{"id":1037,"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Correction: new test name is golden_fixture_representative_charset_coords_are_stable.","created_at":"2026-02-09T02:18:11Z"},{"id":1038,"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"WindyDeer support slice (bench gating): updated scripts/bench_budget.sh to add explicit budgets for web/glyph_atlas_cache/{miss_insert_single,hit_hot_path,eviction_cycle_3keys_budget2} and to run both frame_harness_stats + glyph_atlas_cache filters in quick mode. Validation: bash -n scripts/bench_budget.sh; cargo fmt --check; cargo check --all-targets; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings; focused budget validation via renderer_bench quick runs + ./scripts/bench_budget.sh --quick --check-only --json (new glyph budgets PASS). Note: full ./scripts/bench_budget.sh --quick run currently fails earlier in an unrelated existing ftui-render diff bench panic (tile_dense_regression dense ratio > max_overhead).","created_at":"2026-02-09T03:03:23Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","title":"Implement: WebGPU text rendering (atlas + instanced quads)","description":"Goal
- Render terminal text cells using the glyph atlas and an instanced quad pipeline.

Requirements
- Respect per-cell fg color + attrs (bold/italic/underline as feasible).
- Handle wide glyphs and combining marks (at least gracefully).

Acceptance Criteria
- 120x40 grid @ 60fps with typical demo workloads on modern desktop.
- Instrumented frame timing (CPU submit + GPU time if possible).
","notes":"2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: wired true glyph-atlas texture sampling path in frankenterm-web renderer. Added atlas texture/sampler + glyph metadata storage buffer bindings in WGSL/pipeline; patch application now resolves glyph ids into atlas slots and uploads atlas/metadata on demand; renderer now samples atlas alpha per cell for fg ink (with underline/strikethrough attrs). Added public atlas pixel exposure in glyph_atlas for GPU upload bridge. Current glyph raster source is deterministic procedural fallback; awaiting bd-lff4p.2.4 final raster/metadata contract to swap in production font rasterization.

2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: follow-up polish: batch atlas upload once per apply_patches (avoid N× full-atlas uploads when many new glyphs appear in one frame), treat whitespace as glyph_id=0 (no atlas slot), and key glyph slot mapping by GlyphKey (codepoint+px_size) with redundant glyph_meta writes avoided via CPU-side equality check.

2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: round cell pixel sizes in WebGpuRenderer init/resize so viewport+cell metrics stay aligned on fractional DPR (avoids subtle drift/stretched quads under zoom).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AzureFox","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T03:15:15.950170952Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:06.502429115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-lff4p.2.5","title":"Implement: WebGPU text rendering (atlas + instanced quads)","description":"Goal
- Render terminal text cells using the glyph atlas and an instanced quad pipeline.

Requirements
- Respect per-cell fg color + attrs (bold/italic/underline as feasible).
- Handle wide glyphs and combining marks (at least gracefully).

Acceptance Criteria
- 120x40 grid @ 60fps with typical demo workloads on modern desktop.
- Instrumented frame timing (CPU submit + GPU time if possible).
","notes":"2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: wired true glyph-atlas texture sampling path in frankenterm-web renderer. Added atlas texture/sampler + glyph metadata storage buffer bindings in WGSL/pipeline; patch application now resolves glyph ids into atlas slots and uploads atlas/metadata on demand; renderer now samples atlas alpha per cell for fg ink (with underline/strikethrough attrs). Added public atlas pixel exposure in glyph_atlas for GPU upload bridge. Current glyph raster source is deterministic procedural fallback; awaiting bd-lff4p.2.4 final raster/metadata contract to swap in production font rasterization.

2026-02-08 IndigoRaven: follow-up polish: batch atlas upload once per apply_patches (avoid N× full-atlas uploads when many new glyphs appear in one frame), treat whitespace as glyph_id=0 (no atlas slot), and key glyph slot mapping by GlyphKey (codepoint+px_size) with redundant glyph_meta writes avoided via CPU-side equality check.

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.6","title":"Implement: cursor + selection + hyperlink hover/click rendering","description":"Goal
- Make the terminal feel interactive: cursor, selection visualization, and hyperlink affordances.

Requirements
- Cursor rendering styles: block, bar, underline.
- Selection rendering + copy.
- Hyperlink hover underline + click dispatch.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic visual tests (golden images or checksumable framebuffer dumps).

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","title":"Implement: web input capture layer (keyboard/mouse/touch)","description":"Goal
- Capture browser input events and feed them into the ftui/FrankenTerm world with minimal latency and deterministic semantics.

Requirements
- Keyboard
  - consistent modifier semantics across browsers/OS
  - repeat handling
  - special keys and function keys
  - composition events integrate with IME plan (bd-lff4p.2.9)
- Mouse
  - click/drag/wheel with correct cell coordinates (respects DPR + font metrics)
  - selection gestures
- Touch
  - tap, long-press, scroll; optional pinch zoom

Testing + Logging
- Unit tests for key mapping tables and edge cases (Ctrl/Alt/Meta/Super).
- Property tests for modifier state machines (no stuck modifiers; idempotent focus loss).
- E2E scripts emit JSONL: event counts, encoded bytes (when relevant), and any mapping fallbacks.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic event encoding suitable for record/replay.
- No key ghosting; no stuck modifiers; focus changes handled correctly.
","notes":"NavyCanyon is actively implementing frankenterm-web input schema/module + tests; asked others to avoid overlapping edits in crates/frankenterm-web until push (see Agent Mail thread bd-lff4p.2.7).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GoldForest","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:56:54.271201447Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T19:56:54.271180678Z","close_reason":"Implemented input schema + wasm glue (key/mouse/wheel/touch/composition/focus) with stable JSON encoding + tests; wasm32 check passes","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:52:19.592183195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.2.8","title":"Implement: clipboard integration (copy/paste) for frankenterm-web","description":"Goal
- Implement copy and paste behaviors expected from a modern terminal.

Acceptance Criteria
- Copy uses selection model; paste injects as input stream.
- Works across Chrome/Safari/Firefox within their security constraints.
